description: Use this API to modify area data in the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Areas, Zones and Owners). This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = area_data(iarea, ibus, realar, arname)

parameters.name: iarea
parameters.description: Area number between 1 and 9999. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Area slack bus number. (input; no default allowed).

realar.description: PDES, desired MW area interchange (0.0 by default).
PTOL, desired MW interchange tolerance (0.1 * SBASE by default; for example, when system base MVA is 100.0, the default value of PTOL is 10 MW).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.

data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - Area slack bus not found. - Slack bus is not in this area. - No plant at slack bus. - Type code of slack bus is not 2 or 3. - A Type 3 bus is in the area but it is not the area slack bus. - No equipment is assigned to area.
